## New registry entry

- **ID**:
- **Type**: skill / agent / mcp
- **Project link**:

### Checklist

- [ ] One JSON file added under the correct `registry/<type>/` folder, named `<id>.json`
- [ ] Ran `python scripts/build_index.py` and committed the regenerated `index.json` + `README.md`
- [ ] No secrets — env values are `${VAR}` placeholders
- [ ] The linked project is public and works with Claude Code
